rationale: The citation is used in the core theoretical argument, not just as background. The citing paper explicitly draws on Pocheptsova et al. (2009) to support the claim that resource depletion increases System 1 or heuristic processing, and this logic is used to derive its main hypotheses about warm temperature effects. The cited work also informs interpretation of the experiments that link depletion to poorer performance on complex choices.
relation_description: The citing paper extends Pocheptsova et al. (2009) by introducing ambient temperature as a new antecedent of resource depletion and testing whether this depletion-driven shift toward System 1 processing changes consumer decisions.
